appraisal_events.evidence: « Mais j’espère bien que non ! ... il est assommant, bête et mal élevé. » ... « Et il ne fut plus question de Swann chez les M. Verdurin. »
appraisal_events.explanation: Mme Verdurin publicly disparages Swann and effectively excludes him from the circle’s dinner and even conversation. The narrator’s portrayal of Cottard’s fearful submission ironizes the social authority behind this snub.

status_effects.explanation: He is shut out of the gathering and subsequently not even discussed, signaling clear local exclusion.
